notes: Section 34, acts , ; , , authorized the superintendent, acting superintendent, and principal clerks of the different Indian superintendencies or Indian agencies to administer oaths to expense accounts.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 355, § 837 Stat. 487June 6, 1939, ch. 18553 Stat. 810
Section 35, R.S. § 2064, authorized Indian Agents to take acknowledgements of deeds and to administer oaths.
